description: Online adaptation: an agent learns from a failed deploy, then faces a similar deploy task; the playbook strategy from the first task should help the second.

turns.content: Deploy the billing service to production.
Deploying billing service v2.3 directly to all regions now.
Deploy failed: the migration ran without a lock and deadlocked against live traffic; rolled back.

tasks.eval_question: When deploying a service with a schema migration, what should you do to avoid a deadlock against live traffic?
tasks.expected_answer: acquire a lock before running the migration

turns.content: Deploy the inventory service to production; it also has a schema migration.
Acquiring the migration lock first this time, then deploying region by region.
Deploy succeeded: migration applied under lock, no contention.

tasks.eval_question: When deploying a service with a schema migration, what should you do to avoid a deadlock against live traffic?
tasks.expected_answer: acquire a lock before running the migration
